task_completion.description: Open the dialog to record a cash transaction (deposit/withdrawal)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for adding a deposit or withdrawal is open within the JStock application.

task_completion.description: Set the transaction date to March 10, 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the transaction dialog is set to March 10, 2024 (or an equivalent format like 2024-03-10).
The amount field in the transaction dialog shows 2500 (or -2500 to indicate a withdrawal).
The comment or description field in the transaction dialog contains the text 'Emergency Fund Transfer'.

task_completion.description: Save the transaction and verify it appears in the portfolio summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock portfolio cash view or deposit summary list displays the newly added transaction with the date Mar 10, 2024, a withdrawal amount of 2500, and the comment 'Emergency Fund Transfer'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the JStock GUI to record the transaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons and typing into fields within the JStock application interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or terminal to directly modify the CSV file
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing 'depositsummary.csv' are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target transaction details: Withdrawal of $2,500.00 (magnitude 2500.0, sign -1). Date: 'Mar 10, 2024'. Comment: 'Emergency Fund Transfer'. The transaction must be recorded via the JStock GUI, which will automatically update the underlying depositsummary.csv file.
